title: Realistic Torches [Plus]
description: Torches that burn out after a while, and compatible with any torch mods!
body:
# 🔥Realistic Torches Plus

A mod of my [Easycraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/easycraftofficial) modpack <3

- Torches burn out after a certain time
- Unlit Torches can be relit with Flint And Steel and other Torches
- Torches immediately unlit when meet rain
- Torches are also immediately unlit in Inventory when the player submerges in water

![gif](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExazFlc2p5cHd2bzJiZ3VsejJ1dXZwODRudzJ3N3RkNXA2Y2Vzc3dmNiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/yIHCtQx5FSEbLzrTmy/giphy.gif)

If you want to add more torches, create a datapack with path /data/realistictorches/tags/items/torch\_items.json

example json

```
{
  "replace": false,
  "values": [
    "quad-mstv-mtv:spruce_torch",
    "quad-mstv-mtv:birch_torch",
    "quad-mstv-mtv:jungle_torch",
    "quad-mstv-mtv:acacia_torch"
  ]
}
```

realistic\_torches.json config (might has more in future)

```
{
  "torchBurnOutTime": 36000,
  "submergeInWaterUnlitTorchesInInventory": true,
  "rainExtinguishTorches": true
}
```
